title: WAF Server-Side Request Forgery Blocked
description: Detects SSRF attempts blocked by WAF where attackers try to make the server fetch internal resources. OWASP A10:2021 Server-Side Request Forgery.
query: ('Log Source' = 'OCI WAF Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC WAF Security Logs') and (('Action' = 'BLOCK') and (('Request URL' like '*169.254.169.254*' or 'Request URL' like '*metadata.google*' or 'Request URL' like '*100.100.100.200*' or 'Request URL' like '*localhost*' or 'Request URL' like '*127.0.0.1*' or 'Request URL' like '*0.0.0.0*' or 'Request URL' like '*[::]*' or 'Request URL' like '*0x7f000001*' or 'Request URL' like '*2130706433*' or 'Request URL' like '*http://10.*' or 'Request URL' like '*http://172.16*' or 'Request URL' like '*http://172.17*' or 'Request URL' like '*http://172.18*' or 'Request URL' like '*http://192.168*' or 'Request URL' like '*file:///*' or 'Request URL' like '*gopher://*' or 'Request URL' like '*dict://*' or 'Request URL' like '*oraclecloud.com/opc*' or 'Request URL' like '*metadata.oraclecloud.com*')))
falsepositives: Internal health check endpoints configured through URL parameters
